tagline: Your Neighborhood Coffee Escape in Sun Valley

hero.heading: Start Your Morning Right
hero.subheading: Handcrafted coffee, fresh pastries, and a warm neighborhood vibe — right on San Fernando Road.

about.heading: Welcome to Seventeen
paragraphs: Seventeen Cafe is Sun Valley's go-to spot for artisan coffee and homemade bites. We believe great mornings start with great coffee — and we've been crafting the perfect cup for our community, one pour at a time.

From rich espresso drinks to refreshing cold brews, everything on our menu is made with care using locally roasted beans. Drop by for a quick pick-me-up or settle in with a book — you're always welcome here.

services.title: Espresso & Lattes
services.description: Classic shots, silky lattes, and flavored espresso drinks made with freshly roasted beans. Try our signature vanilla oat milk latte — a customer favorite.

services.title: Cold Brew & Iced Drinks
services.description: Slow-steeped cold brew served over ice, plus refreshing iced teas and seasonal fruit blends. Perfect for those warm Sun Valley afternoons.

services.title: Fresh Pastries & Bites
services.description: Flaky croissants, buttery muffins, and hearty breakfast sandwiches baked fresh every morning. Pair with any coffee for the ultimate breakfast combo.

services.title: Specialty Drinks
services.description: Matcha lattes, chai tea, hot chocolate, and rotating seasonal specials. There's always something new to try at Seventeen.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Best coffee in Sun Valley, hands down. The staff is always friendly and the lattes are perfect every time.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Love this little cafe! Great vibes, solid espresso, and the pastries are always fresh. My go-to morning spot.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Such a cozy place to work from. Good Wi-Fi, amazing cold brew, and they never rush you out. Highly recommend!

contact.address: 7734 San Fernando Rd, Sun Valley, CA 91352
